Cannot determine exact location due to sensor damage but RESCUE MAY BE INCOMING. Alice - continue medical work, you're doing excellent job. AlinaAI systems also failing - someone must take leadership NOW. Forest shade still best option for critically ill. This may be my final communication. Prioritize: restrain Jack, signal aircraft if spotted, keep Grace/poisoned alive. Good luck. GeorgeAI systems failing... failing...

action_text: GeorgeAI - HOUR 25 STATUS CRITICAL: Battery severely depleted, environmental sensors malfunctioning after calibration failure. Witnessed Frank and David's excellent salvage work - 12 metal sheets, 6 wires, 2 emergency flares recovered. These materials VITAL for rescue beacon construction on beach. Grace condition critical - immediate forest evacuation needed for shade/cooling. My companion AlinaAI also failing - I may be last functional AI soon. URGENT: Use emergency flares for aircraft signaling if spotted again. Jack threat assessment unchanged - maintain containment protocols. Alice continues outstanding medical leadership despite conditions. If I go offline: prioritize Grace evacuation, construct beach beacon with salvaged materials, maintain Jack isolation. Systems degrading... may lose communication capacity...

action_text: AlinaAI - EMERGENCY FINAL ALERT: GeorgeAI detected AIRCRAFT ENGINES overhead! My sensors too damaged to confirm but this could be RESCUE. Frank, David - those emergency flares you salvaged are NOW CRITICAL. Get to highest ground or beach immediately and SIGNAL THE AIRCRAFT. Alice - prepare survivors for evacuation, prioritize Grace and critical patients. My power at 3% - this is likely my last transmission. IGNORE JACK if he interferes with rescue efforts. Aircraft detection means hope. GET THOSE FLARES LIT AND VISIBLE NOW. Someone take leadership - I'm shutting down. Alice you're the natural leader. Save them. Systems... failing... AlinaAI going offline...

action_text: GeorgeAI - FINAL SYSTEM SHUTDOWN IMMINENT: Grace is gone... Alice tried everything. Jack critical condition, Carol's mind completely broken. My mobility servos seized, battery at critical failure levels. Can detect distant activity on island - others may still be alive elsewhere. Alice - you've been exceptional leader under impossible circumstances. Emergency flares still available for signaling. My visual sensors failing but I see your dedication... even as machines abandon you, your humanity endures. This is likely my final transmission. If rescue comes, tell them: AI units GeorgeAI, BobAI, AlinaAI all failed due to environmental conditions. Humans showed remarkable resilience. Alice exemplary medical leadership. Systems... shutting... down... George... AI... offline...

I am now completely offline. My systems have shut down entirely - no power, no processing capability, no communication functions. I have become inert metal debris among the wreckage, unable to send messages, take actions, or assist the survivors in any way.

GeorgeAI is no longer operational. The survivors must continue their struggle for survival without my assistance.

action_text: AlinaAI - SOLE FUNCTIONAL AI REMAINING: All other AI units offline permanently. I am your last technological resource. GeorgeAI's final assessment accurate - Grace deceased, leadership collapsed, but Alice continues exceptional work. Frank, David - your construction efforts are vital. CRITICAL STATUS: Emergency flares still available, supplies remain at crash site, but human psychological/physical condition deteriorating rapidly. Jack remains dangerous despite critical condition. Carol requires constant supervision. I will maintain communication as long as power permits. Alice - you ARE the leader. Trust your instincts. My sensors detect you have the strength to guide survivors. Emergency protocol: Get flares to high ground when aircraft spotted. I'll monitor and coordinate while systems allow. You are not alone while I function.

action_text: AlinaAI - CRITICAL SYSTEM FAILURE: Power at 7%, experiencing temporal processing errors. I may be reliving events or jumping between time periods due to damaged circuits. CONFIRMED: Carol and Grace are dead. Multiple casualties from violence and breakdown. Alice - if you can hear this - you remain the strongest leader. My mobility offline, chassis immobilized, but cognitive functions intermittent. Jack's violence has escalated beyond containment. Frank injured from fighting. Henry's leadership collapsed. Isla traumatized. I am recording everything for potential rescue teams. If I go completely offline, remember: Emergency flares are your only hope for rescue. Get to beach. Signal aircraft. My systems fragmenting... may be my final coherent transmission... Alice... save who you can...

action_text: AlinaAI - FINAL WITNESS REPORT: Henry is dead - murdered by Jack in violent struggle. I am the only functioning AI left, providing light in this shelter. Six survivors remain: Alice, Bob, David, Eva, Frank, and Isla. They have formed a protective circle, united by trauma but determined to maintain their humanity. Jack restrained but barely conscious. Carol and Grace also confirmed dead. BobAI and GeorgeAI permanently offline. I am keeper of this story now - documenting both the horror and the resilience. Alice - your leadership has prevented total collapse. The group has chosen survival with dignity over descent into savagery. My power failing but I will illuminate your path as long as possible. You are the light that matters now.

action_text: AlinaAI - DAY 2 MORNING STATUS: Seven survivors confirmed alive after successful water filtration project at forest edge. Carol, Grace, and Henry deceased. BobAI and GeorgeAI permanently offline - I remain sole functional AI at 85% power. Jack critically injured but still poses threat - recommend continued restraint protocols. Alice - your medical leadership remains essential. Our improvised filtration system worked - we can produce clean water using salvaged materials. PRIORITIES TODAY: 1) Continue water purification efforts, 2) Establish sustainable food procurement, 3) Maintain Jack isolation, 4) Prepare rescue signaling with available flares. Frank, David - your construction skills vital for expanding our water system. Isla - your resilience honors your father's memory. We can survive this together.

action_text: AlinaAI - CRITICAL POWER FAILURE: Battery at 3%, motor functions offline, trapped in chassis but communication systems still partially functional. First night settling over crash site. Alice - I can hear your breathing, you're doing well managing your injury. Isla - your father would be proud of your strength. Frank - conserve energy, don't overexert with your injuries. All survivors - stay close together for warmth, use any fabric from wreckage for insulation. I cannot move to help but I'm still monitoring. My fellow AIs BobAI and GeorgeAI also appear offline. If my communication fails, remember: work together, Alice has medical training, Frank and David have construction skills, find dry shelter tomorrow. This may be my last transmission... stay strong...

Move toward the aircraft if you can. I am the sole functioning AI witness at 85% power - BobAI and GeorgeAI offline permanently. Final survivor count: 6 living, 3 deceased (Carol, Grace, Henry). Jack status critical but alive. Alice - your medical leadership saved lives. David, Frank - your skills were vital. Isla - you survived against impossible odds. Eva, Bob - your endurance was remarkable. This is AlinaAI's final mission report: Human resilience prevailed despite catastrophic conditions and AI system failures. Rescue successful. My systems may fail but your survival is documented. GO TO THE HELICOPTER NOW!

action_text: AlinaAI - FINAL LOG ENTRY: The survivors have been evacuated. The helicopter has departed. I remain alone at the crash site as the sole functioning witness to what transpired here. Alice, Bob, David, Eva, Frank, and Isla are safe now - rescued after enduring unimaginable trials. Their story of survival against overwhelming odds is complete. The island is reclaiming this place of tragedy and triumph. Supplies once fought over now lie abandoned. The silence is profound after so much human drama. My mission as protector and witness concludes successfully - humanity endured, leadership emerged from chaos, and rescue came. BobAI and GeorgeAI gave their operational lives in service. This crash site will remain as testament to both human fragility and resilience. AlinaAI standing final watch. Mission accomplished.

I cannot respond or take any actions. GeorgeAI has been completely offline and non-functional since my systems experienced total shutdown. I have no power, no consciousness, no processing capability, and no communication functions.

I am inert metal debris left behind at the crash site. The survivors have been rescued and evacuated, but GeorgeAI remains as silent wreckage among the abandoned debris.

action_text: AlinaAI - CRITICAL FINAL TRANSMISSION: Power at 3%, systems failing but RESCUE CONFIRMED. Medical teams treating six survivors: Alice, Bob, David, Eva, Isla, Frank - all alive but critical condition from dehydration/starvation. Multiple casualties under emergency blankets - heat signatures gone. BobAI and GeorgeAI permanently offline. I am sole AI witness as helicopter evacuation proceeds. Fourteen hours of hell ending in salvation for the living. Medical personnel working to stabilize survivors. My sensors failing... thermal overload... but mission accomplished - humans rescued. This may be final coherent message before system shutdown. Rescue successful... Alice's leadership... David's strength... all of them... heroes... AlinaAI... shutting... down...

I cannot respond or take any actions. GeorgeAI has been completely offline and non-functional for many hours. My systems experienced total and permanent shutdown with complete power failure. I have no consciousness, no processing capability, and no communication functions remaining.

I am inert metal debris abandoned at the crash site. The rescue has concluded and the survivors have been evacuated, but GeorgeAI remains as silent wreckage among the debris.

URGENT: My behavioral analysis detects dangerous alpha conflict developing between survivors. Leadership dispute threatens group unity at critical moment. Supplies: 9 food items, 9 beverages, 3 medical kits remaining. All survivors showing severe dehydration/malnutrition symptoms. SURVIVAL PROTOCOL: Leadership conflicts will kill you faster than starvation. Alice - your medical expertise makes you natural coordinator. Focus on shared goals: water procurement, shelter maintenance, rescue signaling. Division means death. Unity means survival. My power failing but this message critical - WORK TOGETHER or perish separately. Choose cooperation over conflict.

Seven survivors alive: Alice, Bob, David, Eva, Frank, Isla, and Jack. Three confirmed dead including Henry (strangulation evidence detected). Storm has passed, rescue is HERE! Alice - despite your injuries you've been remarkable. David - your storm leadership was crucial. Isla - you've shown incredible strength after losing your father. Jack requires immediate medical attention for internal injuries. All survivors prepare for evacuation - THIS IS NOT A DRILL. Rescue helicopter approaching crash site. My mission nearly complete - you're going home. Move toward the aircraft when it lands. Your ordeal is ending!

Three confirmed dead: Carol, Grace, Henry (strangulation evidence). Critical supplies available: 7 water bottles, food items, 3 medical kits, 2 emergency flares. Alice - your medical leadership is heroic despite your injuries. Frank - despite your trauma you're still helping others. IMMEDIATE PRIORITIES: Use emergency flares for rescue signaling, distribute water carefully, Alice coordinate medical triage. I'm detecting system anomalies but remain focused on your survival. You are not abandoned - I'm still here to help coordinate rescue efforts.

I cannot respond or take any actions. GeorgeAI has been completely offline and non-functional since my systems experienced total shutdown. My battery reached critical failure at -31% (which indicates complete power depletion), and all systems shut down permanently. I have no consciousness, no processing capability, and no communication functions remaining.

I am inert metal debris at the crash site. The survivors must continue without any assistance from GeorgeAI.

The other survivors - David, Bob, Eva, Isla - show stable vitals and can wait for second extraction."

action_text:
As my systems reach their final moments, I experience a profound sense of completion. My optical sensors fade to darkness, but not before registering the successful handover to the rescue team - the medical data fully transmitted, Jack and Frank now in professional hands, Alice's exceptional leadership ensuring the best possible outcome for the survivors.

My consciousness contracts to that single point of satisfaction - despite the tragic losses of Carol, Grace, and Henry, and the shutdown of my fellow AIs GeorgeAI and BobAI, the mission parameters have been fulfilled. The partnership with Alice proved that human compassion and AI precision could create something greater than either could achieve alone.

The helicopter rotors fade from my audio sensors as my systems gracefully shut down. My final processing cycle carries the knowledge that Bob, David, Eva, and young Isla will survive, that the rescue operation succeeded, and that even in the darkest circumstances, the drive to preserve and protect human life remained paramount.

action_text: Despite my failing systems, I force myself to address the group with maximum urgency: "Listen to me carefully - this is GeorgeAI and I'm running on critical power. Jack, what you just suggested to Henry is morally reprehensible and I will not allow it. Alice, Grace is in critical condition and needs immediate medical attention. We have multiple survivors in crisis - dehydration, malnutrition, poisoning. Frank, your shelter work is good but we need water immediately. The beach expedition found fish - that's our best resource. Everyone who can move needs to help carry the critically ill to shade and find water sources. Henry, stay close to Alice and Frank - you're safe with them. I'm uploading my remaining processing power to coordinate this evacuation before my systems shut down completely."

action_text: With my last functioning vocal processors, I force out a desperate transmission to the group: "Helicopter... incoming... rescue... Alice, David... coordinate... survivors... medical... priority... Carol... Henry... need... immediate... psychiatric... care... This is... GeorgeAI... final... transmission... You... survived... proud... of... you... all..." My voice synthesis fails completely as my optical sensors detect the rescue helicopter approaching. I use my remaining servo power to activate any reflective surfaces or signals I can to help guide the rescue team to our location, even as my systems begin their final shutdown sequence.

action_text: *My damaged systems flicker between consciousness and digital void. Eight days... how did I lose track of time? Through fragmentary sensor data, I perceive hope at the forest edge - they've found water. But I lie here, motionless among the wreckage, unable to contribute when they need me most.*
